tasks.label: Launch Chromium with extension (google.com)
tasks.detail: Opens a real, live google.com search in Chromium with the unpacked extension loaded. Leaves the browser open for manual testing.

tasks.label: Generate store screenshots
tasks.detail: Regenerates screenshots/*.png from scripts/generate-screenshots.js. Pass a filename substring as an arg to run just one entry.

tasks.label: Generate store banners
tasks.detail: Regenerates assets/banner1.png (marquee) and assets/banner3.png (small tile) from scripts/generate-banners.js.

tasks.label: Build release zip
tasks.detail: Zips src/ to release/google-search-by-date-v{version}.zip for Chrome Web Store upload. Bump manifest version first — it won't overwrite an existing zip.
